text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The cops and robbers tournament,<n>suspended
due to Twin Turbo's<n>chaotic charge, resumes on
another<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Another close contest between the<n>two teams
unfolds beneath a clear<n>blue sky!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hehe, I got awayagain!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Psh! This is sooo easy! They'renever gonna catch me before thetime runs out!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Awww, whaaat?! But I've still got<n>gas in the
tank! I'm gonna win<n>without even breaking a
swe—

text_block_list.name: Robber Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Run, Turbo! Run! The cops—they're...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh? Whoa! They're behind me!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Now, everyone. Surround them!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There won't be time for further<n>attempts, but if
we can capture the<n>last two people now, victory
will be<n>ours!

text_block_list.name: Cop Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Okayyy! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Whoa-ho-ho! They're coming from in<n>front too!
Nice! Now I'm getting fired<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, my little minion! You've gotta<n>get away
too!

text_block_list.name: Robber Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ack! Owie!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Miniooooon! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Robber Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
S-stay away! Leave me behind and<n>run, Turbo!
You've gotta win!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! I'll get away and I'll win! For<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: This is a straight path hemmed in bytrees and a pond. There is no escaperoute... You will be caught!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
No! I've gotta get away for all the<n>other robbers'
sakes!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
TURBO BOOOOOST! I'm crankin' up<n>the
backburners!

text_block_list.name: Lojista
text_block_list.text:
She torched everyone chasing her<n>with her red
hot dash! That's Twin<n>Turbo for you!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... I-I've still... gotgas left... in the tank...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It appears she's expended all her<n>energy.
Now's our chance!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Noooo! I won't let you get me!
choice_data_list: Go full throttle on that Turbo engine!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Urgh! More! FULL TURBO BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhhh! GOOOOO! Get away from<n>them, Twin
Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You will not... escape! HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Ikuno Dictus! You can catch her! Go,<n>go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Robber Team Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The tournament comes to an end<n>amidst the
sounds of thunderous<n>footsteps and cheers from
the<n>crowd...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And the side that scrapes through to<n>victory is...
the robbers!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! What'd I tell ya? We won!<n>Bet you're
real glad you were a<n>robber!
choice_data_list: I was just keeping an eye on things!
I was just keeping an eye on things!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I keep tellin' ya not to sweat the<n>small stuff! Your
strategy was a huge<n>success!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo beams with pride after<n>using her
signature turbo boost to<n>seize victory.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaah! I can't believe this! I got<n>caught! Ikuno
caught meee!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No. You did not fall victim to me, but to<n>the
combined efforts of the whole cop<n>team.

text_block_list.name: Cop Team
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! You're so cool, Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Lojista
text_block_list.text:
That was still an amazing run, though!<n>Great job,
Twin Turbo!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll get away next time!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Argh! Yes! Next time, I'lldefinitely escape!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff, huff, huff, huff,huff!
choice_data_list: Y-you don't have to breathe so fast!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter... As long as I run...<n>as fast... as
I can... till... the... end...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Got you!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I won't give up! I WON'T! YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Tweeeet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The whistle signals the end of the<n>game. And the
winner of the final<n>one-on-one bout iiis...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: AWW YEEEAH! I... won! I got... away!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Didja see me? I'm so<n>strong!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
So close, and yet victory eluded us... It<n>pains me
to admit this, but you did<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to race again whenever<n>you are! I'm
lookin' forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The crowd showers the two racers<n>with
applause as they praise each<n>other's
performance in the close<n>contest.
